# Summary

## Change type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Governance
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update

## Risk review

- [ ] No secrets, keys, certificates, tokens, or tenant-specific identifiers are included.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes have owner review.
- [ ] Agent, MCP, workflow, or infrastructure changes include threat-model notes.
- [ ] License impact reviewed.
- [ ] SBOM impact understood.

## Validation

- [ ] Typecheck passes.
- [ ] Lint passes.
- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Build passes.
- [ ] Secret scan passes.
- [ ] Policy checks pass.

## Deployment notes

Describe rollout, rollback, required secrets/variables, and any manual approvals.
